category_sources: source_facts.description says this is an XML-based font configuration API for X Windows.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official freedesktop.org fontconfig page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies font configuration for X Windows; source_facts.executables lists fc-* CLI tools.
